  --> benchmark_results/2026-05-10T00-24-35/gpt-4o/conversions/lvalue_array_fun_c1/sample_001/target.rs:18:14
   |
18 | fn main() -> i32 {

error[E0499]: cannot borrow `i` as mutable more than once at a time
  --> benchmark_results/2026-05-10T00-24-35/gpt-4o/conversions/lvalue_array_fun_c1/sample_001/target.rs:22:16

   |             ------ first mutable borrow occurs here
21 |
22 |     if !ok_mod(&mut i) {
   |                ^^^^^^ second mutable borrow occurs here
...
25 |     if !ok_mod(p) {
   |                - first borrow later used here
